{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/57354947?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/r74tech/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/r74tech/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/r74tech/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/r74tech/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/r74tech", "id": 57354947, "login": "r74tech", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjU3MzU0OTQ3", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/r74tech/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/r74tech/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/r74tech/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/r74tech/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/r74tech/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/r74tech", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-39409", "cvss": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:L/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-180", "name": "Incorrect Behavior Order: Validate Before Canonicalize"}], "description": "## Summary

`ipRestriction()` does not canonicalize IPv4-mapped IPv6 client addresses (e.g. `::ffff:127.0.0.1`) before applying IPv4 allow or deny rules. In environments such as Node.js dual-stack, this can cause IPv4 rules to fail to match, leading to unintended authorization behavior.

## Details

The middleware classifies client addresses based on their textual form. Addresses containing "`:`" are treated as IPv6, including IPv4-mapped IPv6 addresses such as `::ffff:127.0.0.1`. These addresses are not normalized to IPv4 before matching.

As a result:

* IPv4 static rules (e.g. `127.0.0.1`) do not match because the raw string differs
* IPv4 CIDR rules (e.g. `127.0.0.0/8`, `10.0.0.0/8`) are skipped because the address is treated as IPv6

For example, with:

`denyList: ['127.0.0.1']`

a request from `127.0.0.1` may be represented as `::ffff:127.0.0.1` and bypass the deny rule.

This behavior commonly occurs in Node.js environments where IPv4 clients are exposed as IPv4-mapped IPv6 addresses.

## Impact

Applications that rely on IPv4-based `ipRestriction()` rules may incorrectly allow or deny requests.

In affected deployments, a denied IPv4 client may bypass access restrictions. Conversely, legitimate clients may be rejected when using IPv4 allow lists.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00342, "percentile": 0.25923}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-xpcf-pg52-r92g", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-08T00:17:14Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xpcf-pg52-r92g", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-xpcf-pg52-r92g"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-39409"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-08T15:16:14Z", "published_at": "2026-04-08T00:17:14Z", "references": ["https://github.com/honojs/hono/security/advisories/GHSA-xpcf-pg52-r92g", "https://github.com/honojs/hono/commit/48fa2233bc092f650119f42df043050737cabf39", "https://github.com/honojs/hono/releases/tag/v4.12.12", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-39409", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xpcf-pg52-r92g"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/honojs/hono/security-advisories/GHSA-xpcf-pg52-r92g", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/honojs/hono", "summary": "Hono has incorrect IP matching in ipRestriction() for IPv4-mapped IPv6 addresses", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-24T21:06:14Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-xpcf-pg52-r92g", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.12.12", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "hono"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 4.12.12"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Hono has incorrect IP matching in ipRestriction() for IPv4-mapped IPv6 addresses
